game_info.title: Plants vs Zombies - Tower Defense
game_info.concept: Plants vs. Zombies™ 2 is a tower-defense strategy game where players defend their brain from waves of zombies by planting various plants on a grid-based lawn. Players collect sun by tapping it, a resource generated by Sunflowers or falling from the sky, then spend it to drag-and-drop plant icons from the UI onto 5 available lanes on the lawn. Each plant possesses unique offensive or defensive abilities, and Plant Food can be dragged onto a plant to activate a powerful, temporary special ability. Progression involves earning Seed Packets from completing over 300 levels across 11 themed worlds, which are used to level up plants, enhancing their stats and unlocking new abilities. Players can also compete in the Arena mode against others to achieve high scores on unique levels and climb leaderboards.
game_info.description: Defend your lawn from waves of approaching zombies! Plant sunflowers to generate sun resources, then use sun to plant offensive units like peashooters. Zombies march down 5 lanes toward your house - if any reach the left side, you lose. Collect falling sun and strategically place plants to stop all zombies in each wave to win. Each plant has unique abilities and costs, so manage your resources wisely!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (↑↓): Navigate plant selection menu
Space: Select/confirm plant choice
Arrow Keys (←→↑↓): Move plant placement cursor on lawn
Space: Place selected plant at cursor position
Shift: Cancel plant selection
Z: Collect falling sun (when near cursor)
Enter: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause game
R: Restart game (from game over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Testing basic plant placement and sun collection mechanics. Verifies that the AI can navigate menus, select plants, collect sun, and place plants on the lawn grid without errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: AI will collect falling sun resources, select sunflower plants from the menu, and place them in strategic positions on the lawn. It will prioritize sun collection and planting sunflowers to establish an economy.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the AI can successfully collect at least 10 sun drops, select plants from the menu, and place at least 5 plants on the lawn without triggering any errors or invalid placements.

TEST_1.expected: The test is successful when the AI can successfully collect at least 10 sun drops, select plants from the menu, and place at least 5 plants on the lawn without triggering any errors or invalid placements.

TEST_2.test_description: Testing full gameplay loop and win condition. Verifies that the AI can build a complete defense, manage resources, and successfully defeat all zombie waves to win the game.
TEST_2.strategy_description: AI will build an optimal defense by first planting sunflowers in back rows for economy, then placing peashooters in front rows for offense. It will prioritize high-threat lanes and adapt plant placement based on zombie positions.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the AI defeats all zombie waves without any zombie reaching the left side of the screen, triggering the win condition and transitioning to GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_2.expected: The test is successful when the AI defeats all zombie waves without any zombie reaching the left side of the screen, triggering the win condition and transitioning to GAME_OVER_WIN state.

TEST_3.test_description: Testing zombie behavior and collision detection. Verifies that zombies move correctly down lanes, attack plants, and are destroyed by projectiles with proper collision detection.
TEST_3.strategy_description: AI will place minimal defenses to observe zombie behavior. It will plant a few peashooters and observe how zombies interact with plants and projectiles across different lanes.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The test is successful when zombies correctly navigate their lanes, stop to eat plants, take damage from projectiles, and are removed when health reaches zero. Collision detection should work accurately.

TEST_3.expected: The test is successful when zombies correctly navigate their lanes, stop to eat plants, take damage from projectiles, and are removed when health reaches zero. Collision detection should work accurately.

TEST_4.test_description: Testing resource management and economy building. Verifies that sun generation from sunflowers works correctly and that the player can sustain continuous plant placement.
TEST_4.strategy_description: AI will focus exclusively on building a sunflower economy by placing multiple sunflowers and collecting all generated sun. It will measure sun generation rate and available resources over time.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The test is successful when sunflowers generate sun at the correct intervals, the sun counter increases appropriately, and the AI can maintain a positive sun economy to continuously place plants.
TEST_4.description: Testing resource management and economy building. Verifies that sun generation from sunflowers works correctly and that the player can sustain continuous plant placement.
TEST_4.strategy: AI will focus exclusively on building a sunflower economy by placing multiple sunflowers and collecting all generated sun. It will measure sun generation rate and available resources over time.
TEST_4.expected: The test is successful when sunflowers generate sun at the correct intervals, the sun counter increases appropriately, and the AI can maintain a positive sun economy to continuously place plants.

TEST_5.test_description: Testing multi-lane defense strategy. Verifies that the AI can manage threats across all 5 lanes simultaneously and prioritize defensive placements effectively.
TEST_5.strategy_description: AI will monitor zombie distribution across all lanes and place defensive plants to balance coverage. It will ensure all lanes have at least one peashooter while maintaining sunflower production.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the AI successfully defends all 5 lanes with balanced plant placement, no lane is left completely undefended, and zombies are eliminated before reaching the house.
TEST_5.description: Testing multi-lane defense strategy. Verifies that the AI can manage threats across all 5 lanes simultaneously and prioritize defensive placements effectively.

TEST_5.expected: The test is successful when the AI successfully defends all 5 lanes with balanced plant placement, no lane is left completely undefended, and zombies are eliminated before reaching the house.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing game state transitions and phase management. Verifies that all game phases (START, PLAYING, PAUSED, GAME_OVER) transition correctly based on player actions and game conditions.
TEST_6.strategy_description: AI will trigger various state transitions by starting the game, pausing, resuming, and either winning or losing. It will verify that each state displays appropriate UI and responds to correct inputs.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The test is successful when all state transitions occur correctly, the gameState.gamePhase variable updates appropriately, and each phase displays the correct UI elements and responds to phase-specific controls.
TEST_6.description: Testing game state transitions and phase management. Verifies that all game phases (START, PLAYING, PAUSED, GAME_OVER) transition correctly based on player actions and game conditions.
TEST_6.strategy: AI will trigger various state transitions by starting the game, pausing, resuming, and either winning or losing. It will verify that each state displays appropriate UI and responds to correct inputs.
TEST_6.expected: The test is successful when all state transitions occur correctly, the gameState.gamePhase variable updates appropriately, and each phase displays the correct UI elements and responds to phase-specific controls.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing edge cases and boundary conditions. Verifies that the game handles edge cases like trying to place plants without enough sun, placing plants on occupied tiles, and zombie wave completion.
TEST_7.strategy_description: AI will deliberately attempt invalid actions like placing expensive plants with insufficient sun, placing plants on occupied tiles, and observing behavior when waves complete and new waves begin.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The test is successful when the game gracefully handles all invalid actions without crashing, displays appropriate feedback, prevents invalid placements, and correctly transitions between waves.
TEST_7.description: Testing edge cases and boundary conditions. Verifies that the game handles edge cases like trying to place plants without enough sun, placing plants on occupied tiles, and zombie wave completion.

TEST_7.expected: The test is successful when the game gracefully handles all invalid actions without crashing, displays appropriate feedback, prevents invalid placements, and correctly transitions between waves.
